case_title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK VS. HEATHER E CASSELL et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
